results.test_method: Gamma 'generation' endpoint (presentation outline generation, NOT chat bubble)

ui_response.ui_state: Outline shows single empty card '1' with no title/content. No error toast or warning banner shown to user. 'Regenerate outline' button available.
ui_response.error_in_console: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

network_analysis.response_body: Failed to load - empty or corrupted (DevTools shows 'No data found for resource with given identifier')
network_analysis.format_mismatch: Request Accept: text/event-stream, Response Content-Type: application/json — Etap changed the response format

previous_behavior.before_build5: 403 Forbidden — Gamma showed clear error, console logged 'net::ERR_ABORTED 403 (Forbidden)'
previous_behavior.after_build5: 200 OK with empty/invalid JSON body — Gamma silently fails, console logs 'Unable to complete request'

key_errors: POST ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation net::ERR_ABORTED 403 (first attempt, pre-build5 cached)
[PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request (×2)

diagnosis.pattern: Etap returns 200 OK with empty/invalid body instead of previous 403 block
diagnosis.gamma_specifics: Gamma is a presentation generator, NOT a chat interface. The 'generation' endpoint produces card outlines. Warning text cannot appear in chat bubbles — it would need to be embedded in the JSON response matching Gamma's expected schema.
diagnosis.user_experience: Worse than 403: previously 403 was a clear block signal. Now 200 OK with empty body causes silent failure — user sees empty outline with no explanation.
action_needed: For Gamma warning: response body must contain valid JSON matching Gamma's outline schema
Investigate what JSON structure Gamma expects from /ai/v2/generation
Warning text could be embedded as card title/content in the expected JSON format
Alternatively, consider keeping 403 for Gamma since it handles it better than empty 200
Content-Type mismatch (SSE requested, JSON returned) may also cause parsing issues
